pr.title: Non-record: KNN Hidden State Retrieval — Scale Deception from Weak to Strong Models (8xH100)

output.summary: Eval-time KNN hidden-state lookup mixes neighbor-derived distributions with neural predictions to expose scale deception between weak and 8×H100 models.
techniques: store hidden states and tokens during scoring for nearest-neighbor lookup
mix neural logits with empirical KNN distributions (λ=0.12)
vectorized torch.cdist+subsampling to stay within eval budget
